physical: Droppings on house, car, or outdoor furniture
Droppings contaminating garden, vegetables, or fruit trees
Smell affecting ability to use outdoor areas
health: Mental health impacts — feeling helpless, ignored, or exhausted
financial: Protective covers or property modification costs
community: Unable to use outdoor community spaces
Visitors reluctant to come to Bellbrook

requestedActions: A formal Bellbrook Flying-fox Camp Management Plan
Clear risk controls for residents and public areas
Active buffer zones and boundary controls
Lawful relocation or dispersal options assessed
Bellbrook treated with the same seriousness as other locations
